title: tofieldia calyculata subsp. collina
intro: Tofieldia calyculata subsp. collina, also known as the bellflower or bellwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Tofieldiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Tofieldia calyculata subsp. collina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
